hero.headline: Satellite intelligence for more profitable and sustainable livestock
hero.subheadline: We measure your pasture biomass with Machine Learning so every hectare yields maximum without degrading your land

problem.title: Overgrazing is destroying Bolivia's cattle lands
painPoints: Reduced carrying capacity year after year
Rotation decisions based solely on intuition
problem.bridge: What if you could see exactly how much grass each paddock has before deciding?

products.title: Two solutions. One goal: intelligent livestock.

grassGauge.name: Grass Gauge
grassGauge.subtitle: Satellite-powered grazing planning
grassGauge.description: We measure biomass, determine nutrients and generate your optimized rotation plan

features.text: ML for biomass and nutrient estimation

cattleVision.name: CattleVision
cattleVision.subtitle: Livestock weighing with drones and AI vision
cattleVision.description: We estimate your cattle weight with drones and LiDAR, without animal stress or physical handling

howItWorks.title: From satellite image to your grazing plan in 3 steps

steps.title: We Capture
steps.description: We obtain multispectral images of your paddocks every 5-10 days via satellite

steps.title: We Analyze
steps.description: Our ML model processes images to estimate available biomass and nutritional content

steps.title: We Plan
steps.description: You receive an optimized rotation plan: which paddock, how many head, for how many days

mapDemo.title: Visualize your field like never before

placeholder.recommendation: Ready for grazing — 120 head x 8 days

technology.title: Precision technology for the field

items.title: Multispectral Imagery
items.description: We capture high-resolution satellite data every 5-10 days

items.title: Machine Learning
items.description: Models trained with real Australian data and validated in Bolivia

technology.pipeline: Satellite → Processing → ML Model → Dashboard → Plan
technology.badge: Developed with real data from Australia. Validated in Bolivia.

aboutPage.hero: Bolivian technology for Latin American agriculture

mission.title: Mission
mission.text: Democratize access to precision technology for Latin American ranchers, increasing the profitability and sustainability of their operations.

vision.title: Vision
vision.text: To be the reference agtech platform for tropical livestock, present in the region's major producing countries.
